title: Title and Introduction
description: Opening slide presenting Some Career Opportunities in the Creative Industries by Group 1, G10 Quezon

title: Graphic Designer — Definition
description: Defines the role of a graphic designer as a visual communicator who crafts images, assets, and layouts using color theory, visual weight, and composition

title: Graphic Designer — Explanation
description: Explains how graphic designers create brand logos, book covers, product packaging, website layouts, and social media campaigns

title: Composer — Definition
description: Defines the role of a composer as a musical artist who writes, arranges, and structures original pieces of music using music theory and instrumentation

title: Composer — Explanation
description: Explains how composers create soundtracks for films, TV, mobile apps, video games, and theme park attractions

title: Video Game Designer — Definition
description: Defines the role of a video game designer as a creative strategist who envisions and develops game structure, mechanics, and interactive elements

title: Video Game Designer — Explanation
description: Explains how video game designers collaborate with writers, artists, and programmers to map stories, balance levels, design combat systems and puzzles

title: Makeup Artist — Definition
description: Defines the role of a makeup artist as a beauty professional who uses the human face and body as a canvas to enhance or transform appearance

title: Makeup Artist — Explanation
description: Explains how makeup artists work in high-fashion runways, photography sets, and specialize in special effects makeup for film and theater

title: Art Director — Definition
description: Defines the role of an art director as a high-level creative leader who oversees visual identity and stylistic execution across graphics, layouts, color, and typography

title: Art Director — Explanation
description: Explains how art directors lead teams in film, advertising, and publishing to execute marketing campaigns and media designs

title: Conclusion — Thank You
description: Ending slide celebrating the presentation's finish, thanking the audience, and opening up for any questions.
speakerNotes: Thank everyone for their time and open the floor to any final questions about the presentation.
